titles.text: Fantastic Marchen: Cake-ya-san Monogatari + Doubutsu Chara Navi Uranai Kosei Shinri Gaku
ァンタジックメルヘン ケーキ屋さん物語+動物キャラナビ占い 個性心理学

descriptions.text: Fantastic Marchen: Cake-yasan Monogatari + Doubutsu Chara Navi Uranai Kosei Shinri Gaku is a Miscellaneous game, published by Culture Brain, which was released in Japan in 2002.
